Speaker.rawBytes: EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E4 BC 8A E7 B9 94 20 E9 A0 86 E5 B9 B3
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B2 B3 E7 BE BD 20 E3 82 86 E3 81 8B E3 82 8A

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Sorry, I don't really have a reason to be up here, I just sorta felt like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Ahaha, I guess I just felt the urge myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Maybe we've been through so much together that our wavelengths are in sync.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's just your imagination.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If I'm on the same wavelength as Junpei, I'd better change the channel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Anyhow, it's so nice today, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The wind's a little chilly, but the fresh breeze feels great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Lookin' from here, the view ain't that bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It's familiar scenery, but I guess that's why it's so calming...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}The end almost doesn't feel real...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}People have been passing out and disappearing out of nowhere lately, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}They've been talking about a lot of Shadow-related incidents on the news, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Mitsuru-senpai said it's because there are too many Shadow victims—the memory revision can't keep up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I don't really get it, but this is all 'cause of Nyx, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Feels like the world's hit rock bottom. There's even weird cults popping up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}I guess this won't be one of those, "Oh, it was just a dream" moments...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Mhm. We'll do whatever we can... No regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I'm not gonna try and act cool and say things like, "I want to protect everyone," but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I couldn't handle it if the time we spent together disappeared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}In fact, the tales of the amazing battles I survived should be handed down through every generation, forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Look who's talking. Weren't you the one who was sulking and giving us a hard time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}W-Well, that was the passion of my youth... You know, I've matured since...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Hell yeah! I'm gonna make the final ball a home run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Don't spoil him, {f 4 1}-kun. He's gonna let it go to his head again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}That's right! I'm a man with a plan! You're not gonna wanna miss this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Well, fine. I'll just have to make a huge comeback then! That's what heroes do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}You never change, do you? I'm almost jealous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'm not one to talk though... I got stuck in my own head and acted out, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I mean, it used to be just the three of us, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}If you'd asked me back then, I never woulda guessed it'd come to this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}We've all been through so much this year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Well, yeah. But you gotta look on the bright side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Our friendship is way stronger now, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Hahaha, don't say that with such a straight face! You're embarrassing me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}But... I guess it hasn't been too bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}We've gotten this far together. So, let's see it through to the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}There you go again... Do you even get the situation we're in, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 2} gets the job done when you need him to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}We just gotta do our best and send 'em packin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}And those two guys from Strega...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}They haven't made a move, but you know they gotta be plannin' something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Let's show 'em what SEES 2-F's trio can do![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Now that I got you guys, I feel way more pumped![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}You never gave me back that CD! In fact, you never return anything you borrow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}What!? Oh, yeah. That... Do you have to bring it up now!?[n]{f 1 1}
